title: UK Reduces Capital Requirements for Stablecoin Issuers
message_html: UK Reduces Capital Requirements for Stablecoin Issuers ...
snippet: The U.K. has introduced new digital asset regulations as part of its ongoing quest to become a cryptocurrency hub. The country’s Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) issued new rules Tuesday (June 30) for crypto companies, mandating they meet capital and stress testing requirements as well as market in

title: ESMA MiCA warning puts Binance EU service changes under scrutiny
message_html: ESMA MiCA warning puts Binance EU service changes under scrutiny ...
snippet: ESMA said EU crypto clients must be served through a MiCA-authorized entity as Binance faces questions over its servicing model in the region after the MiCA deadline.

title: MetaMask launches stablecoin yield account with card spending
message_html: MetaMask launches stablecoin yield account with card spending ...
snippet: MetaMask launches Money Account it says offers up to 4% variable APY on mUSD stablecoin balances and card spending, with DeFi-powered yield via vaults, excluding the UK and EU.

title: StarkWare unveils Starknet quantum roadmap, says industry has no excuse
message_html: StarkWare unveils Starknet quantum roadmap, says industry has no excuse ...
snippet: “The crypto industry shouldn’t need wake-up calls from the White House or anyone else,” said StarkWare CEO Eli Ben-Sasson.
